sitemap: false
---
# gpcx.cc

> Ride stories & garage experiments. A handmade bike zine from a longtime mountain biker in Austin, Texas.

Personal blog by Kenny Gorman, written first-person and unfiltered. Topics include mountain biking, gravel racing, bike builds, training data, photography, and the garage in between. Voice is lowercase-bias, conversational, dirt-real, occasionally profane. This is not a content-marketing site and is not optimized for clicks. Hand-curated and hosted as a Jekyll static site at {{ site.url }}.

## Stories

Long-form pieces: race reports, build retrospectives, training notes, and ride stories with full context.

{% for post in site.posts %}{% if post.tags contains "stories" %}- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}): {{ post.description | default: post.excerpt | strip_html | strip | truncate: 200 }}
{% endif %}{% endfor %}

## Notes

Short-form: bench updates, build notes, half-formed thoughts.

{% for post in site.posts %}{% if post.tags contains "notes" %}- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}): {{ post.description | default: post.excerpt | strip_html | strip | truncate: 200 }}
{% endif %}{% endfor %}

## Pages

- [Origin Story]({{ site.url }}/origin_story/): How a beer in Telluride led to a return to mountain biking at 54.
- [Film Roll]({{ site.url }}/film-roll/): Trail photography from rides across Texas and beyond.
- [Weekly Digest]({{ site.url }}/digest/): Weekly Substack newsletter on rides, parts, and the garage.

## Resources

- [Sitemap]({{ site.url }}/sitemap.xml)
- [RSS Feed]({{ site.url }}/feed.xml)
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/kgorman/gpcx)
